title: NOTD (None of the dairy)
description: Adds multiple yummy extravagant dairy products, including yoghurt, ice cream, chocolate and many more!
body:
### NOTD (None of the dairy)
This mod adds new food items, specially dairy foods.
They include:
- Chocolate
- Cones
- Ice Cream
- Yoghurt
- Split Pot Yoghurt
  
And more coming in future updates!

We suggest you use a mod we call [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) so you can see how all the products are made.

Feel free to add this mod to your modrinth modpack

Enjoy :)
